source_pr.title: topsql: reduce data race of sql digest
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Avoid frequent access to `Statement.SQLDigest` in client-go callback to reduce data race.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

`make race`

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```
